name: reranker-features
description: Track 1 features reranker — confidence/kind/outcome signals. NOTE: tags like 'confidence:verified' and 'kind:superseded' are tag strings only; the features reranker reads entry.confidence and entry.kind (top-level fields), NOT tags. So this fixture is a smoke test that the CLI --reranker path wires through end-to-end on this fixture format. Unit-level coverage of the verified-vs-inferred and distilled-vs-superseded ranking lives in tests/rerankers/features.test.ts. The outcome-driven query (deploy script) DOES exercise a real signal because the 'outcomes' action sets entry.outcome_positive / entry.outcome_negative.

remembers.text: Production database is hosted on us-east-1 (verified by ops 2026-04)
Production database is hosted on us-west-2 (overheard, not confirmed)
